tasting_rooms.name: Cantine Florio
tasting_rooms.pricing: From EUR 35 per person for guided cellar tour and tasting
tasting_rooms.description: Historic 1833 tufa-stone cellars on the Marsala seafront housing 3,000-plus oak barrels; guided tours cover Marsala history and production secrets.
tasting_rooms.tip: Book at least a week ahead in summer; tours run in Italian, English and French.

tasting_rooms.name: Donnafugata Marsala Cellars
tasting_rooms.pricing: EUR 35-65 per person depending on experience
tasting_rooms.description: 1851 historic baglio cellars in Marsala with underground barrique room inspired by Istanbul's Basilica Cistern; full suite of tasting experiences from Iconic Wine Library to gourmet pairings.
tasting_rooms.tip: The underground barrique cellar tour is the unmissable option; book via visit.donnafugata.it.

tasting_rooms.name: Marco De Bartoli - Samperi Cellar
tasting_rooms.address: Contrada Samperi, Mazara del Vallo Road, 91025 Marsala (TP), Sicily
tasting_rooms.pricing: By appointment; group rates on request
tasting_rooms.description: Off-the-beaten-track Marsala estate 14 km from town where the pre-British Marsala tradition of Vecchio Samperi is kept alive; 90-minute cellar tour in English, French or Spanish.
tasting_rooms.tip: Closed weekends and mid-August; GPS coordinates (37.735630, 12.539073) beat the postal address.

tasting_rooms.name: Cantine Pellegrino
tasting_rooms.description: Seven-generation family winery since 1880 with over 1,000 vats and barrels in the historic cellars; tour includes Punic-era archaeological finds, a Sicilian cart museum and a master cooper workshop.
tasting_rooms.tip: Ask for the Ouverture tasting room with panoramic views of the Egadi Islands.

tasting_rooms.name: Vini Gambino
tasting_rooms.description: Family winery on Etna's north slope at 700 m altitude offering sommelier-led tastings paired with Sicilian delicacies; award-winning Tifeo range.
tasting_rooms.tip: Combine with a Gambino lunch for a full 3-hour experience.

tasting_rooms.name: Benanti Viticoltori
tasting_rooms.description: 1734-heritage estate with historic palmento and vineyard walk on Monte Serra; the only winery producing wines from all four Etna slopes using 100% native grapes with autochthonous yeasts.
tasting_rooms.tip: Open Tue-Sun by reservation; 15 km from Catania, 40 km from Taormina.

tasting_rooms.name: Cottanera
tasting_rooms.address: Strada Provinciale 89, Contrada Iannazzo, 95030 Castiglione di Sicilia (CT), Sicily
tasting_rooms.description: 100-hectare Etna estate at 700 m offering contrade-focused tastings with cellared vintages; lunch packages include traditional Etna recipes paired across the range.
tasting_rooms.tip: Book the Le Contrade lunch to taste separately vinified single-vineyard Nerello Mascalese.

verified.address_quoted: Strada Provinciale, 89 - Contrada Iannazzo, 95030 Castiglione di Sicilia CT

tasting_rooms.name: Barone di Villagrande
tasting_rooms.description: Sicily's oldest Etna DOC producer since 1727; historic cellar tours with Etna cuisine pairings and access to a four-room wine resort with infinity pool.
tasting_rooms.tip: The Contrada Villagrande single-vineyard Carricante is poured exclusively on-site.

verified.address_quoted: Via del Bosco, 25, 95010 Milo, Metropolitan City of Catania

tasting_rooms.name: Baglio di Pianetto
tasting_rooms.address: Via Francia, Santa Cristina Gela, 90030 Palermo (PA), Sicily
tasting_rooms.description: Organic estate a few kilometres south of Palermo in an ancient family baglio; private introductory wine courses and guided tastings across highland, Noto and Etna terroirs.
tasting_rooms.tip: Their organic certification spans all vineyard sites; sustainable agriculture is central to the tour narrative.

verified.address_quoted: Via Francia, S. Cristina Gela - 90030 (PA) - Italy

tasting_rooms.name: Palmento Costanzo
tasting_rooms.address: Contrada Santo Spirito, 95012 Passopisciaro, Castiglione di Sicilia (CT), Sicily
tasting_rooms.description: Superbly restored 19th-century palmento at the heart of the estate; 18 hectares of volcanic-soil vineyards with separate contrade vinifications poured in the historic stone press building.
tasting_rooms.tip: One of the finest palmento restorations on Etna; visit pairs well with a Passopisciaro village walk.

verified.address_quoted: Contrada Santo Spirito, Passopisciaro 95012, Castiglione di Sicilia

tasting_rooms.name: Tenute Nicosia
tasting_rooms.description: Organic Etna winery offering contrade immersions, underground cellar tours and a sparkling-wine focus; ancient Monte Gorna palmento adds heritage depth.
tasting_rooms.tip: The sparkling Etna Rosato Brut Methode Classique tasting is a Nicosia signature.

tasting_rooms.name: Donnafugata Pantelleria
tasting_rooms.description: Seasonal cellar set in a traditional palazzotto pantesco with vaulted dammuso ceilings; tasting experiences include Ben Ryé Passito di Pantelleria DOC and dry Zibibbo poured overlooking UNESCO-listed vineyards.
tasting_rooms.tip: Open May-September only; the Ben Ryé sotto le stelle 100-minute evening experience is exceptional.

tasting_rooms.name: Feudo Maccari
tasting_rooms.address: Contrada Maccari, Strada Provinciale Noto-Pachino KM 13.5, 96017 Noto (SR), Sicily
tasting_rooms.pricing: By appointment; cellar visit and tasting on request
tasting_rooms.description: 170-hectare Val di Noto estate with underground cellar and guest accommodation; Nero d'Avola specialist with single-variety and blended expressions in a dramatic desert-landscape setting.
tasting_rooms.tip: Request the underground cellar tour; the estate guesthouse is excellent for overnight stays.

verified.address_quoted: C. Maccari, Strada Prov. Noto-Pachino, KM 13.5, 96017 Noto (SR)

tasting_rooms.name: Tenuta di Castellaro
tasting_rooms.pricing: From EUR 30 per person for sunset tasting
tasting_rooms.description: Volcanic Aeolian Islands estate with 20 ha of organically farmed ancient alberello vines; vineyard picnics and sunset tastings with panoramic sea views.
tasting_rooms.tip: The Bianco Pomice from Malvasia and Carricante and the evening tasting format make this the most dramatic tasting room in Sicily.

tasting_rooms.name: Planeta Sciaranuova
tasting_rooms.description: Planeta's Etna estate inside the Etna Park, with a carefully restored cellar and the Teatro in Vigna natural amphitheatre; exclusive wine shop and panoramic vineyard views of the volcano.
tasting_rooms.tip: The Sciaranuova Festival in summer hosts concerts in the vineyard amphitheatre.
